turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 91-1695, Pioneer Investments Services Co. versus Brunswick Associated Ltd will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: As the opinion on file with the Clerk will indicate, and for the reasons stated therein, the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit is affirmed. Justice O'Connor has filed a dissenting opinion; Justices Scalia, Souter and Thomas have joined that opinion.
